formula.value:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ru">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
    <title>Windows 10 Mobile</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <style>
        /* ОБЩИЕ СТИЛИ */
        * {
            margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box;
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            user-select: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
            -webkit-touch-callout: none; touch-action: manipulation;
            transition: background-color 0.3s ease, color 0.3s ease;
        }

        html, body {
            width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden;
            background: #1a1a2e; position: fixed;
            display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
        }

        /* ПЕРЕМЕННЫЕ ДЛЯ ТЕМ */
        :root {
            --primary-bg: #1a1a2e;
            --primary-color: white;
            --window-bg: white;
            --window-header: #0078d7;
            --window-text: #333;
            --desktop-icon-text: white;
            --taskbar-bg: rgba(30, 30, 30, 0.95);
            --taskbar-text: white;
            --start-menu-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98);
            --start-menu-text: #333;
            --context-menu-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98);
            --context-menu-text: #333;
            --quick-access-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);
            --quick-access-text: #333;
        }

        .dark-theme {
            --primary-bg: #0a0a0f;
            --primary-color: #e0e0e0;
            --window-bg: #1e1e1e;
            --window-header: #005a9e;
            --window-text: #e0e0e0;
            --desktop-icon-text: #e0e0e0;
            --taskbar-bg: rgba(20, 20, 20, 0.95);
            --taskbar-text: #e0e0e0;
            --start-menu-bg: rgba(30, 30, 30, 0.98);
            --start-menu-text: #e0e0e0;
            --context-menu-bg: rgba(40, 40, 40, 0.98);
            --context-menu-text: #e0e0e0;
            --quick-access-bg: rgba(40, 40, 40, 0.95);
            --quick-access-text: #e0e0e0;
        }

        .light-theme {
            --primary-bg: #f0f2f5;
            --primary-color: #333;
            --window-bg: white;
            --window-header: #0078d7;
            --window-text: #333;
            --desktop-icon-text: #333;
            --taskbar-bg: rgba(240, 240, 240, 0.95);
            --taskbar-text: #333;
            --start-menu-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98);
            --start-menu-text: #333;
            --context-menu-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98);
            --context-menu-text: #333;
            --quick-access-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);
            --quick-access-text: #333;
        }

        /* ЗАГРУЗОЧНЫЙ ЭКРАН */
        .boot-screen {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f3460 0%, #1a1a2e 50%, #16213e 100%);
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;
            align-items: center; z-index: 9999; transition: opacity 1s ease-out;
        }

        .boot-screen.hidden { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; }

        .boot-logo {
            font-size: 150px; font-weight: 900; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; text-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.7),
                         0 0 60px rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.5), 0 0 90px rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.3);
            animation: pulse 2s infinite alternate; margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .boot-subtitle {
            position: absolute; bottom: 40px; font-size: 12px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); font-family: 'Segoe UI';
            letter-spacing: 1px; opacity: 0.7;
        }

        .boot-loading {
            width: 300px; height: 4px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            border-radius: 2px; margin-top: 30px; overflow: hidden; position: relative;
        }

        .boot-progress {
            position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; height: 100%; width: 0%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0078d7, #00b4ff);
            border-radius: 2px; transition: width 0.3s ease-out;
        }

        .boot-dots {
            display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 20px;
        }

        .boot-dot {
            width: 10px; height: 10px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 50%; animation: dotPulse 1.5s infinite;
        }

        .boot-dot:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
        .boot-dot:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }

        .boot-status {
            margin-top: 15px; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
            font-family: monospace; min-height: 20px;
        }

        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1); text-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.7); }
            100% { transform: scale(1.05); text-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(0, 120, 215, 1),
                   0 0 80px rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.6); }
        }

        @keyframes dotPulse {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.3); background: rgba(0, 120, 215, 1); }
        }

        /* КОНТЕЙНЕР СИСТЕМЫ */
        .system-container {
            width: 1612px; height: 720px; position: relative;
            background: transparent; overflow: hidden;
            transform-origin: center center; display: none;
        }

        .system-container.loaded { display: block; }

        /* ФОН И РАБОЧИЙ СТОЛ */
        .gradient-bg {
            position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: var(--primary-bg);
            background-image: var(--wallpaper-image, linear-gradient(135deg, #0f3460 0%, #1a1a2e 50%, #16213e 100%));
            background-size: cover;
            background-position: center;
            z-index: -1;
            transition: background-image 0.5s ease;
        }

        .desktop {
            width: 100%; height: 100%; position: relative;
            overflow: hidden; touch-action: none;
        }

        /* ПАНЕЛЬ БЫСТРОГО ДОСТУПА НА РАБОЧЕМ СТОЛЕ */
        .quick-access-panel {
            position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.9);
            background: var(--quick-access-bg); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; min-width: 320px;
            display: none; flex-direction: column; z-index: 800;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
            opacity: 0; transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .quick-access-panel.active {
            display: flex; opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);
        }

        .quick-access-header {
            color: var(--quick-access-text); font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500;
            margin-bottom: 15px; text-align: center;
            padding-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }

        .quick-access-grid {
            display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .quick-access-item {
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
            padding: 15px 10px; background: rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.05);
            border-radius: 8px; color: var(--quick-access-text); cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
        }

        .quick-access-item:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.1);
            transform: translateY(-1px);
            border-color: rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.2);
        }

        .quick-access-item:active {
            transform: scale(0.98);
            background: rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.15);
        }

        .quick-access-item i {
            font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: #0078d7;
        }

        .quick-access-item span {
            font-size: 12px; text-align: center;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .quick-access-close {
            position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px;
            width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); color: var(--quick-access-text);
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            cursor: pointer; font-size: 16px; transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .quick-access-close:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }

        /* ИКОНКИ РАБОЧЕГО СТОЛА */
        .desktop-icons {
            position: absolute; top: 25px; left: 25px;
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 25px;
        }

        .desktop-icon {
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
            width: 80px; padding: 12px; border-radius: 6px;
            color: var(--desktop-icon-text); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        }

        .desktop-icon:active { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); }
        .desktop-icon i { font-size: 36px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
        .desktop-icon span { font-size: 14px; text-align: center; text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px black; }

        /* CMD ЯРЛЫК НА РАБОЧЕМ СТОЛЕ - ИСПРАВЛЕНА СЕТКА */
        .cmd-shortcut {
            position: absolute; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center; width: 80px; padding: 12px; border-radius: 6px;
            color: var(--desktop-icon-text); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            user-select: none; z-index: 10;
        }

        .cmd-shortcut:hover {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        }

        .cmd-shortcut.active {
            background: rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.3);
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.3);
        }

        .cmd-shortcut i {
            font-size: 36px; margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: #00b4ff;
        }

        .cmd-shortcut span {
            font-size: 12px; text-align: center;
            text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px black;
            word-break: break-word;
            max-width: 70px;
            line-height: 1.2;
        }

        /* МОДАЛЬНОЕ ОКНО ДЛЯ РЕДАКТИРОВАНИЯ CMD - НОВЫЙ СТИЛЬ КАК "ЭТОТ КОМПЬЮТЕР" */
        .cmd-editor-modal {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); display: none;
            justify-content: center; align-items: center; z-index: 3000;
        }

        .cmd-editor-modal.active {
            display: flex;
        }

        .cmd-editor-content {
            background: var(--window-bg); border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px; min-width: 500px; max-width: 600px;
            max-height: 80%; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
            box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            transform: scale(0.9); opacity: 0;
            animation: windowOpen 0.3s forwards;
        }

        @keyframes windowOpen {
            to { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
        }

        @keyframes windowClose {
            from { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
            to { transform: scale(0.9); opacity: 0; }
        }

        .cmd-editor-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            padding-bottom: 12px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }

        .cmd-editor-title {
            color: var(--window-text); font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500;
        }

        .cmd-editor-close {
            background: #ff5f57; color: white;
            border: none; border-radius: 50%; width: 28px; height: 28px;
            cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center;
            justify-content: center; font-size: 18px; transition: background 0.2s;
        }

        .cmd-editor-close:hover {
            background: #ff3b30;
        }

        .cmd-form-group {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }

        .cmd-form-label {
            display: block; color: var(--window-text); margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500;
        }

        .cmd-form-input {
            width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; background: var(--window-bg);
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); border-radius: 6px;
            color: var(--window-text); font-size: 13px; outline: none;
            transition: border-color 0.2s;
        }

        .cmd-form-input:focus {
            border-color: #0078d7;
        }

        .cmd-form-textarea {
            width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; background: var(--window-bg);
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); border-radius: 6px;
            color: var(--window-text); font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 12px;
            outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; resize: vertical;
            min-height: 180px; max-height: 350px;
        }

        .cmd-form-textarea:focus {
            border-color: #0078d7;
        }

        .cmd-editor-actions {
            display: flex; justify-content: flex-end;
            gap: 10px; margin-top: 20px;
        }

        .cmd-editor-btn {
            padding: 8px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 5px;
            cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .cmd-editor-btn.primary {
            background: #0078d7; color: white;
        }

        .cmd-editor-btn.primary:hover {
            background: #005a9e;
        }

        .cmd-editor-btn.secondary {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); color: var(--window-text);
        }

        .cmd-editor-btn.secondary:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
        }

        /* ОКНА ПРИЛОЖЕНИЙ С ПЛАВНОЙ АНИМАЦИЕЙ */
        .window {
            position: absolute; top: 100px; left: 150px;
            width: 700px; height: 450px; background: var(--window-bg);
            border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 15px 35px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            display: none; flex-direction: column; z-index: 100;
            overflow: hidden; touch-action: none; min-width: 350px;
            min-height: 250px; max-width: 1500px; max-height: 650px;
            border: 2px solid transparent; transition: border-color 0.3s;
            will-change: transform, left, top;
            transform: scale(0.9); opacity: 0;
            animation: none;
        }

        .window.active {
            display: flex; z-index: 200;
            animation: windowOpen 0.3s forwards;
        }

        .window.closing {
            animation: windowClose 0.3s forwards;
        }

        .window.moving { border-color: #0078d7; box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); }

        .window-header {
            height: 45px; background: var(--window-header); color: white;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 0 15px; font-size: 16px; cursor: move;
            user-select: none; touch-action: none; position: relative;
        }

        .window-header::after {
            content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 10%; right: 10%;
            height: 2px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); border-radius: 1px;
        }

        .window-controls { display: flex; gap: 12px; }

        .window-control {
            width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 12px; user-select: none;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; transition: transform 0.1s;
        }

        .window-control:active { transform: scale(0.9); }
        .window-control.close { background: #ff5f57; }
        .window-control.maximize { background: #ffbd2e; }
        .window-control.minimize { background: #28ca42; }

        .window-content {
            flex: 1; padding: 15px; overflow: auto; font-size: 14px;
            color: var(--window-text); user-select: text; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
            touch-action: pan-y; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
        }

        .window-resize-handle {
            position: absolute; width: 30px; height: 30px;
            bottom: 0; right: 0; cursor: nwse-resize; z-index: 101; touch-action: none;
        }

        .window-resize-handle::after {
            content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 8px; right: 8px;
            width: 12px; height: 12px; border-right: 2px solid var(--window-header);
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--window-header); border-radius: 0 0 3px 0;
        }

        /* ОКНО ВЫПОЛНЕНИЯ CMD */
        .cmd-execution-window {
            position: absolute; top: 100px; left: 150px;
            width: 700px; height: 450px; background: var(--window-bg);
            border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 15px 35px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            display: none; flex-direction: column; z-index: 200;
            overflow: hidden; border: 2px solid #0078d7;
            min-width: 350px; min-height: 250px; max-width: 1500px; max-height: 650px;
            transform: scale(0.9); opacity: 0;
        }

        .cmd-execution-window.active {
            display: flex;
            animation: windowOpen 0.3s forwards;
        }

        .cmd-execution-header {
            height: 45px; background: #0078d7; color: white;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 0 15px; font-size: 15px; font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            user-select: none; cursor: move;
        }

        .cmd-execution-controls {
            display: flex; gap: 10px;
        }

        .cmd-execution-control {
            width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center;
            justify-content: center; font-size: 11px;
            transition: transform 0.1s;
        }

        .cmd-execution-control:active {
            transform: scale(0.9);
        }

        .cmd-execution-control.close {
            background: #ff5f57;
        }

        .cmd-execution-output {
            flex: 1; padding: 15px; overflow-y: auto;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 13px;
            color: var(--window-text); background: var(--window-bg); white-space: pre-wrap;
            line-height: 1.3;
        }

        .cmd-execution-output::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }

        .cmd-execution-output::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        }

        .cmd-execution-output::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #0078d7; border-radius: 3px;
        }

        .cmd-loading {
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            height: 100%; color: var(--window-text); font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
        }

        .cmd-loading-dots {
            display: inline-block; width: 50px; text-align: left;
        }

        .cmd-loading-dots::after {
            content: '...'; animation: dots 1.5s infinite;
        }

        /* ПАНЕЛЬ ЗАДАЧ */
        .taskbar {
            position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 60px;
            background: var(--taskbar-bg); display: flex; align-items: center;
            padding: 0 10px; z-index: 1000; touch-action: none;
        }

        .start-button {
            width: 60px; height: 60px; display: flex; align-items: center;
            justify-content: center; color: var(--taskbar-text); font-size: 24px; cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.2s; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        }

        .start-button:active { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); }

        .windows-icon {
            width: 26px; height: 26px;
            background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 88 88"><path fill="white" d="M0 12.402l35.687-4.86.016 34.423-35.67.203zm35.67 33.529l.028 34.453L.028 75.48.026 45.7zm4.326-39.025L87.314 0v41.527l-47.318.376zm47.329 39.349l-.011 41.34-47.318-6.678-.066-34.739z"/></svg>');
            background-size: contain;
        }

        .notification-area {
            margin-left: auto; display: flex; align-items: center;
            color: var(--taskbar-text); font-size: 16px; gap: 15px; padding-right: 15px;
        }

        .date-time { text-align: right; }
        .time { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; }
        .date { font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.8; }

        /* МЕНЮ ПУСК */
        .start-menu {
            position: absolute; bottom: 60px; left: 10px; width: 350px; height: 500px;
            background: var(--start-menu-bg); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0; display: none; flex-direction: column; 
            z-index: 999; box-shadow: 0 -5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15); 
            overflow: hidden; touch-action: none; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
            transform: translateY(20px); opacity: 0;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .start-menu.active { 
            display: flex; 
            transform: translateY(0);
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .start-header {
            padding: 20px; color: var(--start-menu-text); font-size: 24px; font-weight: 300;
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }

        .start-content {
            display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; flex-direction: column;
        }

        .start-left {
            flex: 1; padding: 10px 0; overflow-y: auto;
        }

        /* ЭЛЕМЕНТЫ ИНТЕРФЕЙСА */
        .start-item, .app-tile {
            color: var(--start-menu-text); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }

        .start-item:active, .app-tile:active { background: rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.1); }

        .start-item {
            display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 12px 20px;
            font-size: 14px; border-radius: 4px; margin: 2px 10px;
        }

        .start-item:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.05);
        }

        .start-item i {
            margin-right: 15px; font-size: 18px; width: 24px; text-align: center;
            color: #0078d7;
        }

        .app-tile {
            background: rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.05); border-radius: 6px;
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
            justify-content: center; padding: 12px; margin: 5px;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
        }

        .app-tile:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.1);
            border-color: rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.2);
        }

        .app-tile:active { transform: scale(0.95); }
        .app-tile i { font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #0078d7; }
        .app-tile span { font-size: 12px; text-align: center; }

        /* КОНТЕКСТНЫЕ МЕНЮ */
        .desktop-context-menu, .file-context-menu {
            position: absolute; background: var(--context-menu-bg);
            border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 0; min-width: 180px;
            display: none; flex-direction: column; z-index: 900;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
            transform: scale(0.95); opacity: 0;
            animation: windowOpen 0.2s forwards;
        }

        .file-context-menu { z-index: 1000; }
        .context-menu.active { display: flex; }

        .context-menu-item {
            padding: 10px 16px; color: var(--context-menu-text); cursor: pointer;
            display: flex; align-items: center; transition: background 0.2s;
            font-size: 13px;
        }

        .context-menu-item:hover { background: rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.1); }
        .context-menu-item i { 
            margin-right: 10px; width: 18px; text-align: center; 
            font-size: 14px; color: #0078d7;
        }

        .context-menu-divider {
            height: 1px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); margin: 4px 0;
        }

        /* СВЕРНУТЫЕ ОКНА */
        .taskbar-windows {
            display: flex; align-items: center; margin-left: 20px;
            gap: 8px; overflow-x: auto; max-width: 800px; padding: 5px 0;
        }

        .taskbar-windows::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }

        .taskbar-window {
            height: 40px; min-width: 120px; max-width: 200px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); color: var(--taskbar-text);
            display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 12px;
            border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px;
            transition: background 0.2s; overflow: hidden;
            white-space: nowrap; text-overflow: ellipsis; flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .taskbar-window:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); }
        .taskbar-window.active { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); }
        .taskbar-window i { margin-right: 8px; font-size: 14px; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .taskbar-window span { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }

        /* ФАЙЛОВЫЙ МЕНЕДЖЕР */
        .file-manager { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
        .file-toolbar { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; padding-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); }

        .file-btn, .notepad-btn {
            padding: 6px 12px; background: #0078d7; color: white;
            border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px;
        }

        .file-btn:hover, .notepad-btn:hover { background: #005a9e; }

        .file-list {
            flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); border-radius: 5px;
        }

        .file-item {
            padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); cursor: pointer;
            display: flex; align-items: center; transition: background 0.2s;
        }

        .file-item:hover { background: rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.05); }
        .file-item.selected { background: rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.1); }
        .file-item i { margin-right: 8px; font-size: 16px; width: 20px; text-align: center; }

        .file-name { flex: 1; }
        .file-size, .file-date { color: var(--window-text); opacity: 0.7; font-size: 12px; }
        .file-size { margin-left: 8px; }
        .file-date { margin-left: 16px; }

        .file-actions {
            margin-left: 8px; display: flex; gap: 4px;
            opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s;
        }

        .file-item:hover .file-actions { opacity: 1; }

        .file-action-btn {
            padding: 2px 6px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); border: none;
            border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 11px;
            color: var(--window-text);
        }

        .file-action-btn:hover { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); }

        /* МОДАЛЬНОЕ ОКНО */
        .file-modal {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); display: none;
            justify-content: center; align-items: center; z-index: 2000;
        }

        .file-modal.active { display: flex; }

        .file-modal-content {
            background: var(--window-bg); border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px;
            min-width: 350px; max-width: 500px; max-height: 80%; overflow-y: auto;
            transform: scale(0.9); opacity: 0;
            animation: windowOpen 0.3s forwards;
        }

        .file-modal-header {
            margin-bottom: 15px; display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
        }

        .file-modal-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--window-text); }
        .file-modal-close {
            background: #ff5f57; color: white; border: none;
            border-radius: 50%; width: 26px; height: 26px;
            cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .file-form-group { margin-bottom: 12px; }
        .file-form-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--window-text); }

        .file-form-input, .file-form-textarea {
            width: 100%; padding: 6px 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            border-radius: 4px; font-size: 13px; background: var(--window-bg);
            color: var(--window-text);
        }

        .file-form-textarea {
            min-height: 120px; resize: vertical; font-family: monospace;
        }

        .file-form-actions {
            display: flex; justify-content: flex-end;
            gap: 8px; margin-top: 15px;
        }

        .file-form-btn {
            padding: 6px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px;
        }

        .file-form-btn.primary { background: #0078d7; color: white; }
        .file-form-btn.secondary { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); color: var(--window-text); }

        /* КАЛЬКУЛЯТОР */
        .calculator-display {
            background: #1a1a1a; color: white; padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 6px; margin-bottom: 12px; text-align: right;
            font-size: 28px; font-family: monospace; min-height: 50px;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .calculator-buttons {
            display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 8px; flex: 1;
        }

        .calc-btn {
            padding: 12px; font-size: 18px; border: none;
            border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; background: #f0f0f0;
            transition: all 0.1s;
        }

        .calc-btn:active { transform: scale(0.95); background: #ddd; }
        .calc-btn.operator { background: #ff9500; color: white; }
        .calc-btn.equals { background: #28ca42; color: white; }
        .calc-btn.clear { background: #ff5f57; color: white; }

        /* ТЕРМИНАЛ */
        .terminal-output {
            flex: 1; background: #1e1e1e; color: #f0f0f0;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 5px; overflow-y: auto; margin-bottom: 8px;
            font-size: 13px;
        }

        .terminal-input {
            display: flex; align-items: center;
            background: #2d2d2d; padding: 8px; border-radius: 5px;
        }

        .terminal-prompt {
            color: #569cd6; margin-right: 8px; font-weight: bold;
        }

        .terminal-cursor {
            background: #569cd6; width: 6px; height: 16px;
            animation: blink 1s infinite;
        }

        @keyframes blink {
            0%, 50% { opacity: 1; }
            51%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        }

        .terminal-command { color: #9cdcfe; }
        .terminal-output-line { margin-bottom: 4px; line-height: 1.3; }

        /* БЛОКНОТ */
        .notepad-textarea {
            flex: 1; width: 100%; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            border-radius: 5px; padding: 12px;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 14px;
            resize: none; outline: none; background: var(--window-bg);
            color: var(--window-text);
        }

        .notepad-toolbar {
            display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px;
            padding-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }

        .notepad-status { margin-top: 8px; color: var(--window-text); opacity: 0.7; font-size: 12px; }

        /* НАСТРОЙКИ - ПЕРСОНАЛИЗАЦИЯ */
        .personalization-settings {
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;
        }

        .settings-section {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }

        .settings-section-title {
            font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 12px;
            color: var(--window-text);
        }

        .wallpaper-grid {
            display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px;
        }

        .wallpaper-item {
            position: relative; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 6px;
            overflow: hidden; border: 2px solid transparent;
            transition: transform 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
        }

        .wallpaper-item:hover {
            transform: scale(1.05);
        }

        .wallpaper-item.active {
            border-color: #0078d7;
        }

        .wallpaper-preview {
            width: 100%; height: 80px; object-fit: cover;
        }

        .wallpaper-name {
            position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7); color: white;
            font-size: 11px; padding: 4px; text-align: center;
        }

        .theme-selector {
            display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px;
        }

        .theme-option {
            flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer; border: 2px solid transparent;
            transition: all 0.2s; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
        }

        .theme-option:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.1);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        .theme-option.active {
            border-color: #0078d7;
            background: rgba(0, 120, 215, 0.15);
        }

        .theme-icon {
            font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        .theme-name {
            font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--window-text);
        }

        .theme-description {
            font-size: 12px; color: var(--window-text);
            opacity: 0.7; text-align: center; margin-top: 4px;
        }

        /* УПРАВЛЕНИЕ КАСАНИЕМ */
        .touch-feedback:active { opacity: 0.8; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- ЗАГРУЗОЧНЫЙ ЭКРАН -->
    <div class="boot-screen" id="bootScreen">
        <div class="boot-logo">0x1</div>
        <div class="boot-loading"><div class="boot-progress" id="bootProgress"></div></div>
        <div class="boot-dots"><div class="boot-dot"></div><div class="boot-dot"></div><div class="boot-dot"></div></div>
        <div class="boot-status" id="bootStatus">Инициализация системы...</div>
        <div class="boot-subtitle">Linemiq</div>
    </div>

    <!-- МОДАЛЬНЫЕ ОКНА -->
    <div class="file-modal" id="fileModal">
        <div class="file-modal-content">
            <div class="file-modal-header">
                <div class="file-modal-title" id="fileModalTitle">Редактирование файла</div>
                <button class="file-modal-close" onclick="fileManager.closeModal()">×</button>
            </div>
            <div id="fileModalContent"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- МОДАЛЬНОЕ ОКНО РЕДАКТИРОВАНИЯ CMD - НОВЫЙ СТИЛЬ -->
    <div class="cmd-editor-modal" id="cmdEditorModal">
        <div class="cmd-editor-content">
            <div class="cmd-editor-header">
                <div class="cmd-editor-title">Редактор CMD Ярлыка</div>
                <button class="cmd-editor-close" onclick="cmdManager.closeEditor()">×</button>
            </div>
            <div class="cmd-form-group">
                <label class="cmd-form-label">Название ярлыка:</label>
                <input type="text" class="cmd-form-input" id="cmdEditorName" placeholder="Мой CMD скрипт">
            </div>
            <div class="cmd-form-group">
                <label class="cmd-form-label">JavaScript код для выполнения:</label>
                <textarea class="cmd-form-textarea" id="cmdEditorCode" placeholder="// Введите JavaScript код здесь
// Например:
alert('Привет, мир!');
console.log('CMD выполнен!');"></textarea>
            </div>
            <div class="cmd-editor-actions">
                <button class="cmd-editor-btn secondary" onclick="cmdManager.closeEditor()">Отмена</button>
                <button class="cmd-editor-btn primary" onclick="cmdManager.saveCmdScript()">Сохранить</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ОКНО ВЫПОЛНЕНИЯ CMD -->
    <div class="cmd-execution-window window" id="cmdExecutionWindow">
        <div class="cmd-execution-header window-header" 
             ontouchstart="startTouchDrag(event, 'cmd')" 
             ontouchmove="touchDrag(event)" 
             ontouchend="stopTouchDrag(event)">
            <span>Выполнение CMD скрипта</span>
            <div class="cmd-execution-controls window-controls">
                <div class="window-control minimize touch-feedback" onclick="minimizeWindow('cmd')">
                    <i class="fas fa-minus"></i>
                </div>
                <div class="window-control maximize touch-feedback" onclick="maximizeWindow('cmd')">
                    <i class="fas fa-square"></i>
                </div>
                <div class="cmd-execution-control window-control close touch-feedback" onclick="cmdManager.closeExecutionWindow()">
                    <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="cmd-execution-output window-content" id="cmdExecutionOutput">
            <!-- Здесь будет вывод выполнения скрипта -->
        </div>
        <div class="window-resize-handle" 
             ontouchstart="startTouchResize(event, 'cmd')" 
             ontouchmove="touchResize(event)" 
             ontouchend="stopTouchResize(event)"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="file-context-menu context-menu" id="fileContextMenu">
        <div class="context-menu-item" onclick="fileManager.openSelected()"><i class="fas fa-folder-open"></i><span>Открыть</span></div>
        <div class="context-menu-item" onclick="fileManager.renameFile()"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i><span>Переименовать</span></div>
        <div class="context-menu-item" onclick="fileManager.deleteFile()"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i><span>Удалить</span></div>
        <div class="context-menu-divider"></div>
        <div class="context-menu-item" onclick="fileManager.properties()"><i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i><span>Свойства</span></div>
    </div>

    <!-- ОСНОВНОЙ ИНТЕРФЕЙС -->
    <div class="system-container" id="systemContainer">
        <!-- ПАНЕЛЬ БЫСТРОГО ДОСТУПА -->
        <div class="quick-access-panel" id="quickAccessPanel">
            <div class="quick-access-close" onclick="closeQuickAccessPanel()">
                <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
            </div>
            <div class="quick-access-header">Быстрый доступ</div>
            <div class="quick-access-grid">
                <div class="quick-access-item" onclick="quickAccessAction('newFolder')">
                    <i class="fas fa-folder-plus"></i>
                    <span>Новая папка</span>
                </div>
                <div class="quick-access-item" onclick="quickAccessAction('newFile')">
                    <i class="fas fa-file-alt"></i>
                    <span>Новый файл</span>
                </div>
                <div class="quick-access-item" onclick="quickAccessAction('newCmd')">
                    <i class="fas fa-terminal"></i>
                    <span>Новый CMD</span>
                </div>
                <div class="quick-access-item" onclick="quickAccessAction('explorer')">
                    <i class="fas fa-folder-open"></i>
                    <span>Проводник</span>
                </div>
                <div class="quick-access-item" onclick="quickAccessAction('terminal')">
                    <i class="fas fa-terminal"></i>
                    <span>Терминал</span>
                </div>
                <div class="quick-access-item" onclick="quickAccessAction('calculator')">
                    <i class="fas fa-calculator"></i>
                    <span>Калькулятор</span>
                </div>
                <div class="quick-access-item" onclick="quickAccessAction('notepad')">
                    <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                    <span>Блокнот</span>
                </div>
                <div class="quick-access-item" onclick="quickAccessAction('settings')">
                    <i class="fas fa-cog"></i>
                    <span>Настройки</span>
                </div>
                <div class="quick-access-item" onclick="quickAccessAction('user')">
                    <i class="fas fa-user"></i>
                    <span>Пользователь</span>
                </div>
                <div class="quick-access-item" onclick="quickAccessAction('wallpaper')">
                    <i class="fas fa-image"></i>
                    <span>Сменить обои</span>
                </div>
                <div class="quick-access-item" onclick="quickAccessAction('refresh')">
                    <i class="fas fa-redo"></i>
                    <span>Обновить</span>
                </div>
                <div class="quick-access-item" onclick="quickAccessAction('power')">
                    <i class="fas fa-power-off"></i>
                    <span>Завершить работу</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="gradient-bg"></div>
        
        <!-- КОНТЕЙНЕР ДЛЯ CMD ЯРЛЫКОВ -->
        <div class="cmd-shortcuts-container" id="cmdShortcutsContainer">
            <!-- CMD ярлыки будут добавляться сюда динамически -->
        </div>
        
        <div class="desktop" id="desktop">
            <div class="desktop-context-menu context-menu" id="desktopContextMenu">
                <div class="context-menu-item" onclick="fileManager.createNewFolder()"><i class="fas fa-folder-plus"></i><span>Создать папку</span></div>
                <div class="context-menu-item" onclick="fileManager.createNewFile()"><i class="fas fa-file-alt"></i><span>Создать текстовый файл</span></div>
                <div class="context-menu-item" onclick="cmdManager.createNewCmd()"><i class="fas fa-terminal"></i><span>Создать CMD ярлык</span></div>
                <div class="context-menu-divider"></div>
                <div class="context-menu-item" onclick="openApp('settings')"><i class="fas fa-cog"></i><span>Настройки</span></div>
                <div class="context-menu-item" onclick="openApp('explorer')"><i class="fas fa-folder-open"></i><span>Открыть проводник</span></div>
                <div class="context-menu-divider"></div>
                <div class="context-menu-item" onclick="changeWallpaper()"><i class="fas fa-image"></i><span>Сменить обои</span></div>
                <div class="context-menu-item" onclick="refreshDesktop()"><i class="fas fa-redo"></i><span>Обновить</span></div>
            </div>

            <div class="desktop-icons">
                <div class="desktop-icon touch-feedback" onclick="openApp('explorer')"><i class="fas fa-folder"></i><span>Этот компьютер</span></div>
                <div class="desktop-icon touch-feedback" onclick="openApp('settings')"><i class="fas fa-cog"></i><span>Параметры</span></div>
                <div class="desktop-icon touch-feedback" onclick="openApp('calculator')"><i class="fas fa-calculator"></i><span>Калькулятор</span></div>
                <div class="desktop-icon touch-feedback" onclick="openApp('terminal')"><i class="fas fa-terminal"></i><span>Терминал</span></div>
                <div class="desktop-icon touch-feedback" onclick="openApp('notepad')"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i><span>Блокнот</span></div>
            </div>

            <div class="taskbar">
                <div class="start-button touch-feedback" id="startButton"><div class="windows-icon"></div></div>
                
                <div class="taskbar-windows" id="taskbarWindows"></div>
                
                <div class="notification-area">
                    <div class="date-time">
                        <div class="time" id="currentTime">21:45</div>
                        <div class="date" id="currentDate">3 февраля 2026 г.</div>
                    </div>
                    <i class="fas fa-chevron-up"></i>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="start-menu" id="startMenu">
                <div class="start-header">Пуск</div>
                <div class="start-content">
                    <div class="start-left">
                        <div class="start-item touch-feedback" onclick="openApp('user')"><i class="fas fa-user"></i><span>Пользователь</span></div>
                        <div class="start-item touch-feedback" onclick="openApp('explorer')"><i class="fas fa-folder"></i><span>Проводник</span></div>
                        <div class="start-item touch-feedback" onclick="openApp('settings')"><i class="fas fa-cog"></i><span>Параметры</span></div>
                        <div class="start-item touch-feedback" onclick="openApp('calculator')"><i class="fas fa-calculator"></i><span>Калькулятор</span></div>
                        <div class="start-item touch-feedback" onclick="openApp('terminal')"><i class="fas fa-terminal"></i><span>Терминал</span></div>
                        <div class="start-item touch-feedback" onclick="openApp('notepad')"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i><span>Блокнот</span></div>
                        <div class="start-item touch-feedback" onclick="openApp('power')"><i class="fas fa-power-off"></i><span>Завершение работы</span></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- ОКНО ПРОВОДНИКА -->
        <div class="window" id="explorerWindow">
            <div class="window-header" ontouchstart="startTouchDrag(event, 'explorer')" ontouchmove="touchDrag(event)" ontouchend="stopTouchDrag(event)">
                <span>Проводник</span>
                <div class="window-controls">
                    <div class="window-control minimize touch-feedback" onclick="minimizeWindow('explorer')"><i class="fas fa-minus"></i></div>
                    <div class="window-control maximize touch-feedback" onclick="maximizeWindow('explorer')"><i class="fas fa-square"></i></div>
                    <div class="window-control close touch-feedback" onclick="closeWindow('explorer')"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="window-content">
                <div class="file-manager">
                    <div class="file-toolbar">
                        <button class="file-btn" onclick="fileManager.createNewFolder()"><i class="fas fa-folder-plus"></i> Новая папка</button>
                        <button class="file-btn" onclick="fileManager.createNewFile()"><i class="fas fa-file-alt"></i> Новый файл</button>
                        <button class="file-btn" onclick="cmdManager.createNewCmd()"><i class="fas fa-terminal"></i> Новый CMD</button>
                        <button class="file-btn" onclick="fileManager.uploadFile()"><i class="fas fa-upload"></i> Загрузить</button>
                        <button class="file-btn" onclick="fileManager.deleteSelected()"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i> Удалить</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="file-list" id="fileList"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="window-resize-handle" ontouchstart="startTouchResize(event, 'explorer')" ontouchmove="touchResize(event)" ontouchend="stopTouchResize(event)"></div>
        </div>

        <!-- ОКНО ПАРАМЕТРОВ С ПЕРСОНАЛИЗАЦИЕЙ -->
        <div class="window" id="settingsWindow">
            <div class="window-header" ontouchstart="startTouchDrag(event, 'settings')" ontouchmove="touchDrag(event)" ontouchend="stopTouchDrag(event)">
                <span>Параметры системы</span>
                <div class="window-controls">
                    <div class="window-control minimize touch-feedback" onclick="minimizeWindow('settings')"><i class="fas fa-minus"></i></div>
                    <div class="window-control maximize touch-feedback" onclick="maximizeWindow('settings')"><i class="fas fa-square"></i></div>
                    <div class="window-control close touch-feedback" onclick="closeWindow('settings')"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="window-content">
                <h3>Параметры системы</h3>
                <p>Настройте параметры вашей системы.</p>
                <br>
                <div class="personalization-settings">
                    <div class="settings-section">
                        <div class="settings-section-title">Фон рабочего стола</div>
                        <div class="wallpaper-grid" id="wallpaperGrid">
                            <!-- Обои будут добавлены динамически -->
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="settings-section">
                        <div class="settings-section-title">Тема оформления</div>
                        <div class="theme-selector">
                            <div class="theme-option active" onclick="changeTheme('default')" data-theme="default">
                                <div class="theme-icon"><i class="fas fa-moon"></i></div>
                                <div class="theme-name">Стандартная</div>
                                <div class="theme-description">Синяя тема Windows</div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="theme-option" onclick="changeTheme('dark')" data-theme="dark">
                                <div class="theme-icon"><i class="fas fa-star"></i></div>
                                <div class="theme-name">Темная</div>
                                <div class="theme-description">Черная тема</div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="theme-option" onclick="changeTheme('light')" data-theme="light">
                                <div class="theme-icon"><i class="fas fa-sun"></i></div>
                                <div class="theme-name">Светлая</div>
                                <div class="theme-description">Белая тема</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="settings-section">
                        <div class="settings-section-title">Системные настройки</div>
                        <div class="setting-item touch-feedback" onclick="openApp('calculator')" style="padding: 8px; margin: 4px 0; border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);">
                            <p><i class="fas fa-volume-up"></i> Звук</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="setting-item touch-feedback" onclick="openApp('calculator')" style="padding: 8px; margin: 4px 0; border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);">
                            <p><i class="fas fa-wifi"></i> Сеть и Интернет</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="setting-item touch-feedback" onclick="openApp('calculator')" style="padding: 8px; margin: 4px 0; border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);">
                            <p><i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i> Обновление и безопасность</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="setting-item touch-feedback" onclick="resetSettings()" style="padding: 8px; margin: 4px 0; border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.1); color: #ff4444;">
                            <p><i class="fas fa-redo"></i> Сбросить настройки</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="window-resize-handle" ontouchstart="startTouchResize(event, 'settings')" ontouchmove="touchResize(event)" ontouchend="stopTouchResize(event)"></div>
        </div>

        <!-- ОКНО КАЛЬКУЛЯТОРА -->
        <div class="window" id="calculatorWindow">
            <div class="window-header" ontouchstart="startTouchDrag(event, 'calculator')" ontouchmove="touchDrag(event)" ontouchend="stopTouchDrag(event)">
                <span>Калькулятор</span>
                <div class="window-controls">
                    <div class="window-control minimize touch-feedback" onclick="minimizeWindow('calculator')"><i class="fas fa-minus"></i></div>
                    <div class="window-control maximize touch-feedback" onclick="maximizeWindow('calculator')"><i class="fas fa-square"></i></div>
                    <div class="window-control close touch-feedback" onclick="closeWindow('calculator')"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="window-content">
                <div class="calculator-display" id="calcDisplay">0</div>
                <div class="calculator-buttons">
                    <button class="calc-btn clear" onclick="calculator.clear()">C</button>
                    <button class="calc-btn" onclick="calculator.addOperation('(')">(</button>
                    <button class="calc-btn" onclick="calculator.addOperation(')')">)</button>
                    <button class="calc-btn operator" onclick="calculator.addOperation('/')">÷</button>
                    
                    <button class="calc-btn" onclick="calculator.addDigit(7)">7</button>
                    <button class="calc-btn" onclick="calculator.addDigit(8)">8</button>
                    <button class="calc-btn" onclick="calculator.addDigit(9)">9</button>
                    <button class="calc-btn operator" onclick="calculator.addOperation('*')">×</button>
                    
                    <button class="calc-btn" onclick="calculator.addDigit(4)">4</button>
                    <button class="calc-btn" onclick="calculator.addDigit(5)">5</button>
                    <button class="calc-btn" onclick="calculator.addDigit(6)">6</button>
                    <button class="calc-btn operator" onclick="calculator.addOperation('-')">-</button>
                    
                    <button class="calc-btn" onclick="calculator.addDigit(1)">1</button>
                    <button class="calc-btn" onclick="calculator.addDigit(2)">2</button>
                    <button class="calc-btn" onclick="calculator.addDigit(3)">3</button>
                    <button class="calc-btn operator" onclick="calculator.addOperation('+')">+</button>
                    
                    <button class="calc-btn" onclick="calculator.toggleSign()">±</button>
                    <button class="calc-btn" onclick="calculator.addDigit(0)">0</button>
                    <button class="calc-btn" onclick="calculator.addDecimal()">.</button>
                    <button class="calc-btn equals" onclick="calculator.calculate()">=</button>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="window-resize-handle" ontouchstart="startTouchResize(event, 'calculator')" ontouchmove="touchResize(event)" ontouchend="stopTouchResize(event)"></div>
        </div>

        <!-- ОКНО ТЕРМИНАЛА -->
        <div class="window" id="terminalWindow">
            <div class="window-header" ontouchstart="startTouchDrag(event, 'terminal')" ontouchmove="touchDrag(event)" ontouchend="stopTouchDrag(event)">
                <span>Терминал</span>
                <div class="window-controls">
                    <div class="window-control minimize touch-feedback" onclick="minimizeWindow('terminal')"><i class="fas fa-minus"></i></div>
                    <div class="window-control maximize touch-feedback" onclick="maximizeWindow('terminal')"><i class="fas fa-square"></i></div>
                    <div class="window-control close touch-feedback" onclick="closeWindow('terminal')"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="window-content">
                <div class="terminal-output" id="terminalOutput">
                    <div class="terminal-output-line">
                        <span class="terminal-prompt">user@system:~$</span>
                        <span class="terminal-command">Добро пожаловать в терминал Windows 10 Mobile!</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="terminal-output-line">Введите 'help' для просмотра доступных команд.</div>
                    <div class="terminal-output-line">Используйте 'createcmd [имя]' для создания CMD ярлыка на рабочем столе.</div>
                </div>
                <div class="terminal-input">
                    <span class="terminal-prompt">user@system:~$</span>
                    <input type="text" id="terminalInput" style="flex: 1; background: transparent; border: none; color: white; outline: none; font-family: monospace;" onkeypress="terminal.handleKeyPress(event)">
                    <div class="terminal-cursor" id="terminalCursor"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="window-resize-handle" ontouchstart="startTouchResize(event, 'terminal')" ontouchmove="touchResize(event)" ontouchend="stopTouchResize(event)"></div>
        </div>

        <!-- ОКНО БЛОКНОТА -->
        <div class="window" id="notepadWindow">
            <div class="window-header" ontouchstart="startTouchDrag(event, 'notepad')" ontouchmove="touchDrag(event)" ontouchend="stopTouchDrag(event)">
                <span>Блокнот</span>
                <div class="window-controls">
                    <div class="window-control minimize touch-feedback" onclick="minimizeWindow('notepad')"><i class="fas fa-minus"></i></div>
                    <div class="window-control maximize touch-feedback" onclick="maximizeWindow('notepad')"><i class="fas fa-square"></i></div>
                    <div class="window-control close touch-feedback" onclick="closeWindow('notepad')"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="window-content">
                <div class="notepad-toolbar">
                    <button class="notepad-btn" onclick="notepad.newFile()">Новый</button>
                    <button class="notepad-btn" onclick="notepad.openFile()">Открыть</button>
                    <button class="notepad-btn" onclick="notepad.saveFile()">Сохранить</button>
                    <button class="notepad-btn" onclick="notepad.saveAs()">Сохранить как</button>
                    <button class="notepad-btn" onclick="notepad.print()">Печать</button>
                </div>
                <textarea class="notepad-textarea" id="notepadTextarea" placeholder="Введите текст здесь..." oninput="notepad.updateStatus()"></textarea>
                <div class="notepad-status" id="notepadStatus">Строк: 1 | Символов: 0</div>
            </div>
            <div class="window-resize-handle" ontouchstart="startTouchResize(event, 'notepad')" ontouchmove="touchResize(event)" ontouchend="stopTouchResize(event)"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // КЭШИРОВАНИЕ DOM ЭЛЕМЕНТОВ
        const elements = {
            bootScreen: document.getElementById('bootScreen'),
            bootProgress: document.getElementById('bootProgress'),
            bootStatus: document.getElementById('bootStatus'),
            systemContainer: document.getElementById('systemContainer'),
            startButton: document.getElementById('startButton'),
            startMenu: document.getElementById('startMenu'),
            currentTime: document.getElementById('currentTime'),
            currentDate: document.getElementById('currentDate'),
            taskbarWindows: document.getElementById('taskbarWindows'),
            desktopContextMenu: document.getElementById('desktopContextMenu'),
            fileContextMenu: document.getElementById('fileContextMenu'),
            fileModal: document.getElementById('fileModal'),
            fileModalContent: document.getElementById('fileModalContent'),
            fileModalTitle: document.getElementById('fileModalTitle'),
            fileList: document.getElementById('fileList'),
            quickAccessPanel: document.getElementById('quickAccessPanel'),
            desktop: document.getElementById('desktop'),
            cmdEditorModal: document.getElementById('cmdEditorModal'),
            cmdEditorName: document.getElementById('cmdEditorName'),
            cmdEditorCode: document.getElementById('cmdEditorCode'),
            cmdExecutionWindow: document.getElementById('cmdExecutionWindow'),
            cmdExecutionOutput: document.getElementById('cmdExecutionOutput'),
            cmdShortcutsContainer: document.getElementById('cmdShortcutsContainer'),
            wallpaperGrid: document.getElementById('wallpaperGrid'),
            gradientBg: document.querySelector('.gradient-bg')
        };

        // МЕНЕДЖЕР ТЕМ И ОБОЕВ
        const themeManager = {
            currentTheme: 'default',
            currentWallpaper: 'default',
            
            wallpapers: [
                {
                    id: 'default',
                    name: 'Стандартные',
                    image: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0f3460 0%, #1a1a2e 50%, #16213e 100%)'
                },
                {
                    id: 'blue',
                    name: 'Синий градиент',
                    image: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0078d7 0%, #00b4ff 50%, #0099bc 100%)'
                },
                {
                    id: 'purple',
                    name: 'Фиолетовый',
                    image: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #6a11cb 0%, #2575fc 100%)'
                },
                {
                    id: 'sunset',
                    name: 'Закат',
                    image: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #ff7e5f 0%, #feb47b 100%)'
                },
                {
                    id: 'ocean',
                    name: 'Океан',
                    image: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #1e3c72 0%, #2a5298 100%)'
                },
                {
                    id: 'forest',
                    name: 'Лес',
                    image: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0f9b0f 0%, #056608 100%)'
                },
                {
                    id: 'dark',
                    name: 'Темная',
                    image: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0a0f 0%, #1a1a1a 100%)'
                },
                {
                    id: 'light',
                    name: 'Светлая',
                    image: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #f0f2f5 0%, #e4e6e9 100%)'
                },
                {
                    id: 'abstract',
                    name: 'Абстрактная',
                    image: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #ff0084 0%, #33001b 100%)'
                }
            ],
            
            init: function() {
                // Загружаем настройки из localStorage
                this.loadSettings();
                // Применяем тему
                this.applyTheme();
                // Применяем обои
                this.applyWallpaper();
                // Инициализируем выбор обоев
                this.initWallpaperSelector();
            },
            
            loadSettings: function() {
                try {
                    const savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('windows_theme');
                    const savedWallpaper = localStorage.getItem('windows_wallpaper');
                    
                    if (savedTheme) this.currentTheme = savedTheme;
                    if (savedWallpaper) this.currentWallpaper = savedWallpaper;
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error('Ошибка загрузки настроек:', e);
                }
            },
            
            saveSettings: function() {
                try {
                    localStorage.setItem('windows_theme', this.currentTheme);
                    localStorage.setItem('windows_wallpaper', this.currentWallpaper);
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error('Ошибка сохранения настроек:', e);
                }
            },
            
            changeTheme: function(themeName) {
                this.currentTheme = themeName;
                
                // Удаляем все классы тем
                document.body.classList.remove('dark-theme', 'light-theme');
                
                // Добавляем нужный класс темы
                if (themeName === 'dark') {
                    document.body.classList.add('dark-theme');
                } else if (themeName === 'light') {
                    document.body.classList.add('light-theme');
                }
                
                // Обновляем активную тему в интерфейсе
                document.querySelectorAll('.theme-option').forEach(option => {
                    option.classList.remove('active');
                    if (option.dataset.theme === themeName) {
                        option.classList.add('active');
                    }
                });
                
                // Сохраняем настройки
                this.saveSettings();
                
                // Обновляем иконки на рабочем столе
                this.updateDesktopIcons();
            },
            
            changeWallpaper: function(wallpaperId) {
                this.currentWallpaper = wallpaperId;
                this.applyWallpaper();
                
                // Обновляем активные обои в интерфейсе
                document.querySelectorAll('.wallpaper-item').forEach(item => {
                    item.classList.remove('active');
                    if (item.dataset.wallpaper === wallpaperId) {
                        item.classList.add('active');
                    }
                });
                
                // Сохраняем настройки
                this.saveSettings();
            },
            
            applyTheme: function() {
                this.changeTheme(this.currentTheme);
            },
            
            applyWallpaper: function() {
                const wallpaper = this.wallpapers.find(w => w.id === this.currentWallpaper) || this.wallpapers[0];
                document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--wallpaper-image', wallpaper.image);
                
                // Также применяем к фону напрямую
                if (elements.gradientBg) {
                    elements.gradientBg.style.backgroundImage = wallpaper.image;
                }
            },
            
            initWallpaperSelector: function() {
                if (!elements.wallpaperGrid) return;
                
                elements.wallpaperGrid.innerHTML = '';
                
                this.wallpapers.forEach(wallpaper => {
                    const wallpaperItem = document.createElement('div');
                    wallpaperItem.className = 'wallpaper-item touch-feedback';
                    if (wallpaper.id === this.currentWallpaper) {
                        wallpaperItem.classList.add('active');
                    }
                    wallpaperItem.dataset.wallpaper = wallpaper.id;
                    
                    wallpaperItem.innerHTML = `
                        <div class="wallpaper-preview" style="background: ${wallpaper.image};"></div>
                        <div class="wallpaper-name">${wallpaper.name}</div>
                    `;
                    
                    wallpaperItem.onclick = () => {
                        this.changeWallpaper(wallpaper.id);
                    };
                    
                    elements.wallpaperGrid.appendChild(wallpaperItem);
                });
            },
            
            updateDesktopIcons: function() {
                // Обновляем текстовые тени для иконок в зависимости от темы
                const desktopIcons = document.querySelectorAll('.desktop-icon span, .cmd-shortcut span');
                if (this.currentTheme === 'light') {
                    desktopIcons.forEach(icon => {
                        icon.style.textShadow = '1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
                    });
                } else {
                    desktopIcons.forEach(icon => {
                        icon.style.textShadow = '1px 1px 2px black';
                    });
                }
            },
            
            resetSettings: function() {
                if (confirm('Вы уверены, что хотите сбросить все настройки темы и обоев?')) {
                    this.currentTheme = 'default';
                    this.currentWallpaper = 'default';
                    this.applyTheme();
                    this.applyWallpaper();
                    this.initWallpaperSelector();
                    this.saveSettings();
                    alert('Настройки сброшены!');
                }
            }
        };

        // ФУНКЦИИ ДЛЯ ТЕМ И ОБОЕВ
        function changeTheme(themeName) {
            themeManager.changeTheme(themeName);
        }

        function changeWallpaper(wallpaperId) {
            themeManager.changeWallpaper(wallpaperId);
        }

        function resetSettings() {
            themeManager.resetSettings();
        }

        // МЕНЕДЖЕР CMD ЯРЛЫКОВ
        const cmdManager = {
            cmdShortcuts: [],
            editingCmdId: null,
            
            // Создать новый CMD ярлык
            createNewCmd: function(name = null, code = null) {
                const cmdId = Date.now();
                const cmdName = name || `CMD ${this.cmdShortcuts.length + 1}`;
                const cmdCode = code || `// CMD скрипт ${cmdName}
console.log('Выполнение CMD скрипта: ${cmdName}');
alert('CMD скрипт "${cmdName}" выполнен!');`;
                
                const cmdScript = {
                    id: cmdId,
                    name: cmdName,
                    code: cmdCode,
                    position: this.getNextPosition()
                };
                
                this.cmdShortcuts.push(cmdScript);
                this.saveToLocalStorage();
                this.renderCmdShortcuts();
                
                if (!name) {
                    alert(`CMD ярлык "${cmdName}" создан на рабочем столе!`);
                }
                
                closeQuickAccessPanel();
                closeContextMenu();
                
                return cmdScript;
            },
            
            // Получить следующую доступную позицию на рабочем столе
            getNextPosition: function() {
                const positions = this.cmdShortcuts.map(cmd => cmd.position);
                const gridX = 100;
                const gridY = 110;
                const startX = 25;
                const startY = 25;
                const maxX = 1400;
                const maxY = 500;
                
                for (let row = 0; row < 5; row++) {
                    for (let col = 0; col < 12; col++) {
                        const x = startX + (col + 1) * gridX;
                        const y = startY + row * gridY;
                        
                        if (x > maxX || y > maxY) continue;
                        
                        const positionOccupied = positions.some(pos => 
                            Math.abs(pos.x - x) < gridX && Math.abs(pos.y - y) < gridY
                        );
                        
                        if (!positionOccupied) {
                            return { x, y };
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                return {
                    x: 150 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 12) * gridX,
                    y: 25 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 5) * gridY
                };
            },
            
            // Отобразить все CMD ярлыки
            renderCmdShortcuts: function() {
                elements.cmdShortcutsContainer.innerHTML = '';
                
                this.cmdShortcuts.forEach(cmd => {
                    const cmdElement = document.createElement('div');
                    cmdElement.className = 'cmd-shortcut';
                    cmdElement.id = `cmd-${cmd.id}`;
                    cmdElement.style.left = cmd.position.x + 'px';
                    cmdElement.style.top = cmd.position.y + 'px';
                    
                    cmdElement.innerHTML = `
                        <i class="fas fa-terminal"></i>
                        <span>${cmd.name}</span>
                    `;
                    
                    // Обработчики событий
                    let clickTimer = null;
                    let isLongPress = false;
                    
                    cmdElement.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                        if (!isLongPress) {
                            this.executeCmdScript(cmd);
                        }
                        isLongPress = false;
                    });
                    
                    cmdElement.addEventListener('mousedown', startLongPress);
                    cmdElement.addEventListener('touchstart', startLongPress);
                    
                    cmdElement.addEventListener('mouseup', endLongPress);
                    cmdElement.addEventListener('mouseleave', endLongPress);
                    cmdElement.addEventListener('touchend', endLongPress);
                    cmdElement.addEventListener('touchcancel', endLongPress);
                    
                    cmdElement.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        this.showCmdContextMenu(e, cmd);
                    });
                    
                    function startLongPress(e) {
                        isLongPress = false;
                        cmdElement.classList.add('active');
                        clickTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                            isLongPress = true;
                            cmdManager.openEditor(cmd);
                        }, 2000);
                    }
                    
                    function endLongPress() {
                        if (clickTimer) {
                            clearTimeout(clickTimer);
                            clickTimer = null;
                        }
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            cmdElement.classList.remove('active');
                        }, 100);
                    }
                    
                    // Перетаскивание
                    let isDragging = false;
                    let startX = 0, startY = 0;
                    let startLeft = 0, startTop = 0;
                    
                    cmdElement.addEventListener('mousedown', startDrag);
                    cmdElement.addEventListener('touchstart', startDragTouch);
                    
                    function startDrag(e) {
                        if (e.button !== 0) return;
                        e.preventDefault();
                        startDragCommon(e.clientX, e.clientY);
                    }
                    
                    function startDragTouch(e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        const touch = e.touches[0];
                        startDragCommon(touch.clientX, touch.clientY);
                    }
                    
                    function startDragCommon(clientX, clientY) {
                        isDragging = true;
                        startX = clientX;
                        startY = clientY;
                        
                        const rect = cmdElement.getBoundingClientRect();
                        const containerRect = elements.systemContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                        const scale = parseFloat(elements.systemContainer.style.transform.match(/scale\(([^)]+)\)/)?.[1] || 1);
                        
                        startLeft = (rect.left - containerRect.left) / scale;
                        startTop = (rect.top - containerRect.top) / scale;
                        
                        document.addEventListener('mousemove', drag);
                        document.addEventListener('touchmove', dragTouch);
                        document.addEventListener('mouseup', stopDrag);
                        document.addEventListener('touchend', stopDrag);
                    }
                    
                    function drag(e) {
                        if (!isDragging) return;
                        e.preventDefault();
                        dragCommon(e.clientX, e.clientY);
                    }
                    
                    function dragTouch(e) {
                        if (!isDragging) return;
                        e.preventDefault();
                        const touch = e.touches[0];
                        dragCommon(touch.clientX, touch.clientY);
                    }
                    
                    function dragCommon(clientX, clientY) {
                        const deltaX = clientX - startX;
                        const deltaY = clientY - startY;
                        const containerRect = elements.systemContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                        const scale = parseFloat(elements.systemContainer.style.transform.match(/scale\(([^)]+)\)/)?.[1] || 1);
                        
                        let newLeft = startLeft + deltaX / scale;
                        let newTop = startTop + deltaY / scale;
                        
                        newLeft = Math.max(25, Math.min(1500, newLeft));
                        newTop = Math.max(25, Math.min(550, newTop));
                        
                        const gridSize = 25;
                        newLeft = Math.round(newLeft / gridSize) * gridSize;
                        newTop = Math.round(newTop / gridSize) * gridSize;
                        
                        cmdElement.style.left = newLeft + 'px';
                        cmdElement.style.top = newTop + 'px';
                        
                        cmd.position = { x: newLeft, y: newTop };
                    }
                    
                    function stopDrag() {
                        isDragging = false;
                        document.removeEventListener('mousemove', drag);
                        document.removeEventListener('touchmove', dragTouch);
                        document.removeEventListener('mouseup', stopDrag);
                        document.removeEventListener('touchend', stopDrag);
                        
                        cmdManager.saveToLocalStorage();
                    }
                    
                    elements.cmdShortcutsContainer.appendChild(cmdElement);
                });
            },
            
            // Выполнить CMD скрипт
            executeCmdScript: function(cmd) {
                elements.cmdExecutionOutput.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="cmd-loading">
                        Выполнение CMD скрипта: <strong>${cmd.name}</strong>
                        <div class="cmd-loading-dots"></div>
                    </div>
                `;
                
                if (!windowManager.windows.cmd) {
                    windowManager.windows.cmd = { 
                        id: 'cmdExecutionWindow', 
                        icon: 'fas fa-terminal', 
                        title: 'CMD: ' + cmd.name, 
                        minimized: false,
                        open: false
                    };
                } else {
                    windowManager.windows.cmd.title = 'CMD: ' + cmd.name;
                }
                
                windowManager.windows.cmd.open = true;
                windowManager.windows.cmd.minimized = false;
                
                // Используем новую анимацию открытия
